list.description: Base URL of the Brain API. Use http://localhost:8000 locally, or https://your-domain.com in production.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM tasks WHERE status='pending'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM tasks WHERE status='in_progress'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM tasks WHERE status='done'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM tasks WHERE status NOT IN ('done','cancelled') AND priority_num >= 4
